warnings.message: You're too far from the flock's route to join within your distance — here's a solo run near home instead.
You're too far from the flock's route to join within your distance — here's a solo run near home instead.
You go further than the rest, so you'll run the last 2.5km solo — the flock peels off where it reaches its turnaround.
You go further than the rest, so you'll run the last 1.8km solo — the flock peels off where it reaches its turnaround.
